code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut first = true
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if has
      let signed = if neg
        0 - cur
      else
        cur
      end
      let v = signed * 2
      if first
        result = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{v}"
      end
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    neg = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  let signed = if neg
    0 - cur
  else
    cur
  end
  let v = signed * 2
  if first
    result = "#{v}"
  else
    result = "#{result} #{v}"
  end
end

println(result)
